mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_NO, U.USER_ID, U.PASSWORD, U.USER_NAME, U.PHONE, U.EMAIL, U.ROLE, S.STORE_ID, S.STORE_NAME FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN STORES S ON S.OWNER_USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId} AND U.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT USER_ID , USER_NAME , PHONE , EMAIL , CREATED_AT , STATUS FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
